arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Four clubs make Jonathan David approach as Barca plan Dani Olmo appeal
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta could be tempted to dip into the transfer market in January as his Arsenal side attempt to breathe new life into their Premier League title challenge

arts.ttl: When is the Copa del Rey last 16 draw and who could Barca face?
arts.sum: Hansi Flick’s side will now find out their next opponents on Wednesday, January 8 when the draw for the next round is made at 12pm CET. There were plenty of shocks again in the third round with Las Palmas, Real Valladolid and Sevilla all knocked out of the tournament.

arts.ttl: Barcelona chief holds meeting Jhon Duran's agent as Aston Villa name asking price amid PSG interest?
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly hold a meeting with Jhon Duran's agent as Aston Villa name their asking price amid interest from Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: 4 players who could leave Barcelona in January
arts.sum: The futures of four members of the first-team setup at La Liga giants Barcelona are considered as being up in the air with a view to the 2nd half of…

arts.ttl: Barcelona hold meeting with agents of Aston Villa star
arts.sum: The transfer team at La Liga giants Barcelona recently sat down for a meeting with the representatives of Aston Villa star Jhon Durán. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have…

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Athletic Bilbao: Predicted XI for Spanish Super Cup semi-final but will Lamine Yamal be fit to start?
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Barcelona could line up for Wednesday's Spanish Super Cup semi-final against Athletic Club.

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao lineup vs. Real Madrid: Predicted XI for Spanish Super Cup clash with Williams brothers set to return
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Athletic Bilbao could line up for Wednesday's Spanish Super Cup semi-final against Barcelona.

arts.ttl: PSG and Barca eye Villa's Duran - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: PSG and Barcelona eye Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran, Juventus want a swap deal with Manchester United to exchange Dusan Vlahovic for Joshua Zirkzee, Wolves striker Matheus Cunha considers his options.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich make call on January move for Barcelona star Dani Olmo
arts.sum: The brass at German giants Bayern Munich have come to a decision on a potential winter swoop for Barcelona star Dani Olmo. That’s according to Diario Sport, citing BILD, who…

arts.ttl: When was the last time neither Real Madrid nor Barcelona were in the Super Cup final?
arts.sum: This week, Saudi Arabia will host the 41st edition of the Spanish Super Cup. The first semi-final will see Athletic Club, the reigning Copa del Rey champions, face 2023/24 LaLiga runners-up Barcelona - a repeat of the 2021 final which the Basques won in extra-time. The other semi-final between LaLiga champions Real Madrid and Copa del Rey runners-up Mallorca, will be played on Thursday.
